title: Achalasia
subtitle: Understanding and treating this rare swallowing disorder
description: Clear, evidence-based information about achalasia — what it is, how it is diagnosed, and the treatments that help most people eat comfortably again. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

guidelines.title: ACG Clinical Guideline: Diagnosis and Management of Achalasia
AGA Clinical Practice Update on the Evaluation and Management of Achalasia
ISDE Expert Consensus on the Management of Achalasia
